about.summary: Kapruka is Sri Lanka's largest homegrown online gift and shopping platform. Dulith Herath incorporated it in 2002 (as Lanka Dot Info) and launched the e-commerce site in 2003 — the country's first homegrown e-commerce platform. Kapruka Holdings PLC went public in 2021 (raising LKR 505.5 million) and trades on the Colombo Stock Exchange as KPHL. Today it spans 125,000+ products and 500+ brands, with offices in five countries and its own delivery, productions, and technology arms.
about.mission: To improve the everyday lives of millions by creating seamless digital shopping experiences — connecting Sri Lankan consumers and the global diaspora to the products, brands, and services they love.
about.vision: To be the definitive digital commerce gateway for Sri Lanka — a borderless platform where every click opens a world of choices.
services: Kapruka E-Commerce — flagship retail platform, 125,000+ products across every category
Kapruka Productions — in-house cakes, floral arrangements, and value-added produce
Kapruka Cross Border — lets Sri Lankan brands sell globally
Global Shop — lets local customers buy from international retailers
Partner Central — platform for 500+ supplier brands
Grasshoppers Delivery — same-day and next-day island-wide delivery

easy_refunds_returns.title: Easy Refunds & Returns
easy_refunds_returns.text: Returns, Refunds & Other Policies of Kapruka

general_overview.title: General Overview
general_overview.text: Kapruka offers easy returns if you are not happy with a product. You generally have 15 to 30 days to contact customer service to arrange a return, with slightly different conditions for specific categories such as consumer electronics.

general_merchandise_return_refund_policy.title: General Merchandise — Return & Refund Policy
general_merchandise_return_refund_policy.text: All returns must be postmarked within 15 days of the purchase date. Returned items must be in new and unused condition, with all original tags and labels attached. To initiate a return, customers must email info@kapruka.com to obtain a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number. Once received, the item should be securely packed in its original packaging. Return shipping charges or pickup costs will be paid or reimbursed by Kapruka.

electronics_return_refund_policy.title: Electronics — Return & Refund Policy
electronics_return_refund_policy.text: Electronic items can be returned and refunds claimed if there is a genuine reason. If a product is found to be faulty, damaged, or not working at the time of delivery, the customer can claim a replacement or refund depending on the product category. If the received product does not match the image or description published, the customer must contact Kapruka within 1 week (7 days) . Refunds are processed within 5—7 business days . Importantly, "Change of Mind" is not considered a genuine reason for return. Any fault or defect must be reported within 1 week of the item's arrival.

fashion_clothing_return_refund_policy.title: Fashion / Clothing — Return & Refund Policy
fashion_clothing_return_refund_policy.text: If a clothing item received does not match the published image, the customer must contact Kapruka within 7 days . "Change of Mind" or "No Longer Needed" are not accepted as valid reasons for return or refund. If a clothing item arrives damaged, customers should immediately photograph the damage and contact Kapruka via WhatsApp at 070 285 5000 . For exchanges, the customer must arrange a courier to return the product within 3—5 days of receipt, bearing all delivery expenses. The exchanged product must be of equal or higher value than the original purchase.

global_shop_return_refund_policy.title: Global Shop — Return & Refund Policy
global_shop_return_refund_policy.text: Kapruka Global Shop customers are covered under a Money Back Guarantee if an item does not arrive. You will either receive the item ordered or get your money back. Returns are accepted if the item is defective, damaged, different from what was ordered, or not according to the seller's specification. Customers must contact the Global Shop Hotline at +94-11-7551111 within 24 hours of receiving the item. Once a return is received, Kapruka inspects it and notifies the customer via email. Refunds are issued to the original payment method used at the time of purchase (e.g., credit card refunds go back to the credit card). Kapruka is not required to accept returned items that are damaged, missing parts, or in an unsellable condition due to customer negligence, misuse, or tampering.

order_cancellation_policy.title: Order Cancellation Policy
order_cancellation_policy.text: Orders may be cancelled by the customer only, and only if order processing has not yet commenced . If processing has already started, Kapruka reserves the right to refuse cancellation or offer only a partial refund , recovering any production or purchase costs incurred.

money_transfers_refund_policy.title: Money Transfers — Refund Policy
money_transfers_refund_policy.text: For money delivery services, there is no cancellation charge . Kapruka will fully refund the online deposit if the service is not processed or provided. Duplicate transactions are automatically detected and deleted, with only one transaction allowed to proceed at a time.

key_contact_information.title: Key Contact Information
key_contact_information.text: Channel Details Hotline +94-11-7551111 Email info@kapruka.com WhatsApp 070 285 5000 Bottom line: Kapruka's policies vary by product category. Electronics and fashion have stricter windows (7 days), general merchandise allows up to 15 days, and Global Shop requires contact within 24 hours of delivery. "Change of Mind" is generally not accepted as a valid return reason across all categories. General Merchandise — Refunds and Return Policy Electronic Items — Refunds and Return Policy Fashion / Clothing — Refunds and Return Policy Global Shop — Refunds and Return Policy

how_long_do_i_have_to_return_an_item_to_.title: How long do I have to return an item to Kapruka?
how_long_do_i_have_to_return_an_item_to_.text: For general merchandise, you have 15 days from purchase to contact customer service. Electronics must be reported within 7 days of arrival if faulty or mismatched. Fashion items also have a 7-day window. Global Shop customers must contact within 24 hours of receipt.

will_kapruka_pay_for_return_shipping_acr.title: Will Kapruka pay for return shipping across Sri Lanka?
will_kapruka_pay_for_return_shipping_acr.text: Yes, for general merchandise returns, Kapruka covers return shipping costs or reimburses pickup expenses islandwide. For fashion exchanges, customers must arrange and pay for courier costs within 3—5 days of receipt.

can_i_return_an_item_because_i_changed_m.title: Can I return an item because I changed my mind?
can_i_return_an_item_because_i_changed_m.text: "Change of Mind" is not accepted as a valid reason for returns on electronics or clothing. Returns are only accepted for genuine reasons: faulty items, damage, or products not matching the published description.

how_quickly_will_i_receive_my_refund.title: How quickly will I receive my refund?
how_quickly_will_i_receive_my_refund.text: Refunds are typically processed within 5—7 business days. The money is returned to your original payment method, whether that's a credit card or another payment option you used at checkout.

what_if_my_order_hasn_t_been_processed_y.title: What if my order hasn't been processed yet—can I cancel it?
what_if_my_order_hasn_t_been_processed_y.text: Yes, you can cancel before processing begins. However, if processing has already commenced, Kapruka may refuse cancellation or offer only a partial refund to cover production and purchase costs incurred.
